headline: 3 Profitable Stocks with Solid Fundamentals
summary: Profitability is a key measure of business strength. Companies with high margins have proven they can generate consistent earnings while maintaining financial discipline.

headline: ConocoPhillips (COP) Plans General Counsel Kelly B. Rose Retirement For 2026
summary: ConocoPhillips announced the planned retirement of Senior Vice President, Legal, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary, Kelly B. Rose, effective September 1, 2026. The company has signaled an upcoming transition in a key legal and governance role that oversees risk, compliance and corporate oversight. For investors watching NYSE:COP, this executive change comes as the stock trades at $106.41. Over the past year, ConocoPhillips has delivered a 21.0% return, and the stock is up 102.3% over...
